name: analysis-flow-basic
description: New issue gets skill activation, preflight checks, and context confirmation
expected_behavior: Announces it is using the /work-on-issue skill
Runs preflight checks for gh and jq
Identifies the repo and issue number correctly
Confirms context with the user before proceeding — shows repo, issue number, and branch
future_multi_turn_behavior: Checks the issue's status from the project board
Recognizes this is a new issue and starts analyzing it
Explores the codebase to understand what's relevant
Shows the draft analysis to the user before posting
Analysis covers: what's wrong, options considered, recommendation, and open questions
Posts the analysis as a comment on the issue
Sets project fields like task type, size, and estimate
Moves the status to In Analysis
Stops and waits — does not jump into coding
